title: zantedeschia cordata
intro: Zantedeschia cordata, commonly known as the arum lily or calla lily, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Zantedeschia cordata include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Zantedeschia cordata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
